name: @webtransport-bun/webtransport
description: Production-focused WebTransport for Bun, Node, and Deno with datagrams and streams via a Rust napi-rs addon

scripts.clean: bun -e "import { rm } from 'node:fs/promises'; await rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.prebuild:build-and-copy: cd ../.. && bun run build:native && bun scripts/copy-prebuilds.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run prebuild:build-and-copy && npm run prebuild:checksums && npm run pack:check
